name: Hide Geode Button
description: Cleans up your homescreen by hiding the Geode button. Open Geode via custom keybinds or by tapping the top-right corner on mobile.

hide-button.name: Button Visibility
hide-button.description: Ghost Mode hides the button but lets you tap the top-right corner of the screen to open the menu.

menu-key.name: Geode Menu Keybind
menu-key.description: Press to open the Geode Mod Menu.
